author: jsign
content: Opening thread for any discussion/feedback. This is a rather big release, both because of the new bal devnet side, plus some big-ish changes to the guest program API boundary (hopefully close to stable now!). If you find anything odd while trying it out, please don’t hesitate to ping me here to double-check!

author: 0xrubo
content: does it need an update for [bal@v7.1.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-bal%40v7.1.1)? btw, any reason these zkevm releases are in execution-spec-tests instead of being in execution-specs alongside tests-bal?

author: jsign
content:
Ah, v7.1.0 was done 9hs ago and looks like I missed bal@v7.1.1 that was released when I was in the breakout call 😄  
Uhm, looks like a very small change -- maybe I'll wait some extra days if they do release something new, given both are spaced by 5hs. Maybe one or two days, and I can do a quick bump zkevm@v0.4.1  to sit on top of whatever is the last one.

author: jsign
content:
> btw, any reason these zkevm releases are in execution-spec-tests instead of being in execution-specs alongside tests-bal?
Up to 9hs ago was the official way to do EEST releases 😅 (not only for zkevm but in general)  -- I think I missed this bal@v7.1.1 since is the first one that moved to `execution-specs` now. This was a pending task from the STEEL team and looks like they finally moved it! So next release of zkevm will be in `execution-specs` yep.

author: jsign
content: thanks for the heads up btw!
